jsonLd.title: Xpressbees is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Xpressbees. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Meerut-based team.

About Xpressbees:
Xpressbees is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
